sections.name: Section 1
sections.content_preview: You're still prompting him every hour. Maybe every 90 minutes. You've got the timer on your phone, and when it goes off, you say it again: "Hey, let's try the potty."

sections.name: Section 13
sections.content_preview: You've been at this for about six weeks. The school year is approaching. You're moving from "almost trained" to "mostly trained", and this gradual prompt-fading is the step that gets you there. The ki
